sizing_rule.note: Parametric formula D = (U*Shrink)+(S*E*Stretch) calculates position value at different standard deviation levels. Uses arithmetic mean (U) and population standard deviation (S) as statistical inputs with scaling parameters (Shrink/Stretch) to determine optimal position size. Specific optimal_f value not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Position sizing uses the parametric formula D = (U*Shrink)+(S*E*Stretch) to calculate price value at different standard deviation levels for optimal position determination.
